description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and a prominent wraparound balcony featuring glass railings. The exterior is clad in dark horizontal siding, contrasted by large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light. The house appears to have multiple rooms, including open-plan living spaces and private bedrooms, all accessible from the balcony. The structure is elevated on stilts, with spiral staircases leading up to the main level from the ground. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with dark siding, expansive glass windows, and a wraparound balcony with glass railings. The structure is elevated on stilts and features spiral staircases for access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, sliding doors, and the central section of the wraparound balcony.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the balcony, multiple rooms, and the continuation of glass railings along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the balcony, additional doors, and two spiral staircases descending from the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more private rooms, windows, and the extended balcony wrapping around the corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door opening onto the balcony, with no visible steps or porch, and a minimalist, open design.
